text: Hi, my name's Mabel and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance and we want to help you find a better weight. Just to make sure we're finding you the right quote, may I ask, are you under the age of 80? Am I lost? What did you say? Sorry, I didn't catch that. Just to confirm really quick, are you under the age of 80? I'm 92 years old.
